description_long: This apartment building is a modern, multi-story structure with a flat, dark roof and a striking facade featuring alternating black and white sections. The exterior is punctuated by numerous rectangular windows with blue frames, arranged in a mostly vertical alignment, giving the building a contemporary and geometric appearance. Several balconies are visible, particularly on the front and side elevations, providing outdoor space for residents. The ground floor is set back with a covered entrance area supported by columns, and there are external staircases and platforms extending from the sides. The building sits on a raised platform with surrounding paved areas, likely for pedestrian access and possibly parking. The overall design is clean, angular, and functional, with a focus on symmetry and modern aesthetics.
description: A modern, multi-story apartment building with a flat roof, black and white facade, blue-framed windows, and several balconies. The structure features geometric lines, a raised platform, and a covered entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, multiple balconies, and a prominent black-and-white facade with blue-framed windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical window arrangement, external staircase, and extended platform area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a symmetrical window pattern, additional balconies, and the building's raised base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more vertical windows, a visible balcony, and the continuation of the raised platform.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical columns with regular spacing, creating a symmetrical and orderly pattern across all facades. Some windows are grouped near balconies, while others are evenly distributed.
